fieldDescription: By setting this to false, Dawn will more...creatively interpret her core personal beliefs. Not the intended experience.
Reduce the amount of effects in the custom mission battles
Strikecraft can't be repaired over starting HP at deployment.
Strikecraft can't recover over starting CR at deployment.
The higher the value, the more times a Strikecraft can return to a carrier for full repairs. The number of repairs is roughly equivalent to this value divided by the units DP.
Hull percentage that strikecraft will return to carrier for repairs. Higher values generally offer more survivability as you progress into the late game.
Double Tap time delay to Quick/Assault Boost. The lower the value, the shorter the input window.

fieldName: Recall player only if they are holding fire
fieldDescription: By default, ships with recall device will automatically recall the player under certain conditions. If enabled, the ship will recall player only if they are holding fire.
